description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in autonomous mode and traveling northwest on 17th Street toward Idaho Avenue in Santa Monica 
slowed to a gradual stop with its brake and hazard lights activated during a simulated pick-up/drop-off maneuver when the right side mirror 
of a cargo van (Vehicle 2), passing on the left, swiped the left side mirror of the stopped Zoox vehicle. The operator of Vehicle 2 initially 
pulled over but left shortly after, without exchanging information. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage. There were no reported 
injuries, and police were not notified.
Print
Clear Form
